description_long: This object is a wooden guard rail composed of three horizontal planks evenly spaced and supported by two vertical posts at each end. The wood has a rich brown color and a smooth, matte finish, with visible grain patterns suggesting a natural timber construction. The ends of the horizontal rails are flush with the outer faces of the vertical posts, giving the structure a clean, rectangular profile. There are no visible fasteners or decorative elements, and the design is utilitarian, likely intended for use in parks, sidewalks, or low-traffic urban areas. The posts appear to be solid and robust, providing stability to the entire structure. The ends of the rails are blunt, with no flaring or additional safety features.
description: A simple, brown wooden guard rail with three horizontal planks and two sturdy vertical posts, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a clean, rectangular profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced horizontal wooden rails supported by two vertical posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the rails and posts, emphasizing the flatness of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same arrangement of horizontal rails and vertical posts visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the rails and posts.
